name: elijahmurray
description: Credit card churning toolkit. Companion to travel-hacking-toolkit — the earn side, not the burn side.

plugins.name: credit-card-hacker
plugins.description: AI-powered credit card churning. Skills + reference data for picking your next card, hitting min spend, deciding when to cancel/downgrade/keep, hunting elevated and NLL offers, planning bank-bonus runs, and avoiding shutdowns.
